name: @radzor/email-verify
description: Verify email addresses by checking syntax, MX record existence, and disposable email provider detection. Supports single and bulk verification with no external API dependencies.

inputs.name: checkMx
inputs.description: Whether to perform MX record lookup (requires DNS access).

inputs.name: checkDisposable
inputs.description: Whether to check against known disposable email providers.

inputs.name: timeout
inputs.description: Timeout in milliseconds for DNS lookups.

fields.name: email
fields.description: The email address that was verified.

fields.name: valid
fields.description: Whether the email passes all checks.

fields.name: syntaxValid
fields.description: Whether the email has valid syntax.

fields.name: mxExists
fields.description: Whether MX records exist for the domain.

fields.name: disposable
fields.description: Whether the domain is a known disposable provider.

events.name: onVerified
events.description: Fired after an email address is verified.

events.name: onError
events.description: Fired when verification encounters an error (e.g. DNS timeout).

params.name: emails
params.description: Array of email addresses to verify.

llm.constraints: No external dependencies — uses Node.js built-in dns module. MX checks require network access. Disposable email list is bundled (not exhaustive). Does not perform SMTP mailbox verification.
